serverInfo.name: Relace-Repos
serverInfo.title: Relace Repos
serverInfo.description: Browse Relace repos through MCP resources/templates and manage repos, single-file updates, retrieval, and repo tokens with structured tools.

instructions: Use resources and resource templates for every GET endpoint. Use tools only for create, update, upload, delete, token creation, token deletion, and retrieve POST workflows. Keep tool parameters primitive: pass metadata/filter payloads as JSON strings instead of nested MCP objects. Use elicitation for create/update/upload/delete flows. For repo updates, prefer a single diff operation or a single git sync per tool call instead of complex bulk mutations. For file-based inputs, use the default SharePoint/OneDrive/HTTP fileUrl strategy. Return structured content from tools.
